Off Calendar Nov-30-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sonia R. Martin, Esq., from SNR Denton, LLP, 415-882-2476, for defendant and moving party
Wesley M. Lowe, Esq., from Mannion & Lowe, 415-733-1053, for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel Appraisal And Stay is Granted. Insurance Code 2071 mandates an appraisal. There is no reason to delay compelling that appraisal and staying the action. Once the appraisal has occurred, if any issues remain, those issues can be addressed at that time. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
